title: dalbergia oblongifolia
intro: Dalbergia oblongifolia, also known as Indian black bean tree, is a type of legume tree native to India and Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The extracts from Dalbergia oblongifolia have shown to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations from the tree include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine practices.
